title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 407.583 - Warranty repairs, labor cost compensation to dealer
text:
407.583.  Warranty repairs, labor cost compensation to dealer. — When a dealer makes repairs to any motor vehicle or vessel pursuant to any warranty provision, the dealer shall receive from the manufacturer or distributor giving the warranty, reasonable compensation for labor at a rate no less than that posted by the dealer for labor not under warranty.
(L. 1987 H.B. 232 § 1, A.L. 1990 H.B. 1279)
